description: Evaluates security operations (SOC) maturity—service governance, KPIs/KRIs, SOC systems and team, escalation, unified detection and monitoring, correlation, cross-service visibility, threat containment, threat intelligence, trend analysis, and AI SecOps.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: A SOC service exists, is scoped appropriately, and is reviewed on a regular cadence for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise SOC service exists
Regular SOC service efficacy review

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: SOC KPIs and KRIs—including mean time to detect (MTTD), mean time to respond (MTTR), alert fidelity, and AI triage accuracy—are documented and reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for SOC service
Regular KPI/KRI review
Mean time to detect and respond metrics
Alert fidelity and false-positive rates
AI triage accuracy and analyst efficiency metrics

capabilities.name: SOC System
capabilities.description: A unified SOC system processes logs enterprise-wide, deploys SOAR, supports trend dashboards, is reviewed quarterly, and integrates with other security systems.
evaluation_focus: Unified SOC system processing raw logs
Enterprise-wide or multiple SOC deployment scope
SOAR initiatives as part of SOC
SOC config and log processing review
Integration with vulnerability, patch management, and enforcement points
Enterprise trend identification on SOC dashboards

capabilities.name: SOC team
capabilities.description: A clear T1, T2, and T3 analyst hierarchy captures anomalies with defined FTE or contractor staffing.
evaluation_focus: T1, T2, and T3 analyst hierarchy for incident analysis
FTE versus contractor staffing model

capabilities.name: Escalation process
capabilities.description: A formalized incident escalation process is automated where possible and reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Formalized documented incident escalation process
Automated incident escalation by SOC system
Regular incident escalation process review

capabilities.name: SOC detection and monitoring
capabilities.description: The SOC performs behavioural analysis, software-based scanning, and real-time log monitoring with quarterly accuracy review.
evaluation_focus: Behavioural analysis capability
Automatic behavioural analysis
Software-based scanning capability
Automatic software-based scanning
Real-time log monitoring capability
Regular detection accuracy review

capabilities.name: Correlation
capabilities.description: The SOC correlates identity, device, network, threat, application, and data logs with threat hunting activities.
evaluation_focus: Identity log correlation
Device log correlation
Network log correlation
Threat information correlation
Threat hunting activities
Application log correlation
Data log correlation

capabilities.name: Cross-service visibility and KPI monitoring
capabilities.description: Compliance visibility logs and KPI/KRI artifacts from other management services feed the SOC for correlation and measurement.
evaluation_focus: Compliance visibility logs sent to SOC
SOC monitors KPI/KRI artifacts for other management services

capabilities.name: Rapid threat containment
capabilities.description: The SOC blocks access based on compromise threats with automatic blocking and unblocking.
evaluation_focus: Block access based on compromise threats
Automatic blocking and unblocking of compromised or remediated resources

capabilities.name: Threat intelligence management
capabilities.description: A threat intelligence platform ingests information automatically, is reviewed quarterly, and integrates with SOC and other segments.
evaluation_focus: Threat intelligence platform and management service
Automatic threat intelligence ingestion and remediation recommendations
Regular threat intelligence accuracy and relevance review
Threat intelligence integration with SOC and other segments

capabilities.name: AI SecOps
capabilities.description: AI assists alert triage, investigation summarization, and playbook selection while maintaining analyst oversight and governance.
evaluation_focus: AI-assisted alert triage and prioritization
AI-generated investigation summaries with analyst review
Governance for AI use in SOC workflows

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
